controls.title: Data Protection by Design
controls.rationale: Implement data protection principles from the outset of system design
controls.recommendation: Design systems with privacy-by-default settings and encryption enabled

controls.title: Data Protection by Default
controls.rationale: Apply appropriate technical and organizational measures
controls.recommendation: Use minimum required personal data with strong access controls

controls.title: Security of Processing
controls.rationale: Implement appropriate security measures for personal data processing
controls.recommendation: Use encryption, pseudonymization, and regular security assessments

controls.title: Restoration of Availability
controls.rationale: Ensure ability to restore data availability after incidents
controls.recommendation: Implement automated backups with tested recovery procedures

controls.title: Breach Notification
controls.rationale: Notify supervisory authority of personal data breaches
controls.recommendation: Establish 72-hour notification procedures with documented breach investigations

controls.title: Communication to Data Subjects
controls.rationale: Notify individuals of high-risk data breaches
controls.recommendation: Document communication procedures and maintain notification records

controls.title: Right of Access
controls.rationale: Individuals must access their personal data within 30 days
controls.recommendation: Implement systems to retrieve and present personal data upon request

controls.title: Right to Data Portability
controls.rationale: Provide personal data in machine-readable format
controls.recommendation: Establish export capabilities for all personal data

controls.title: Right to Erasure
controls.rationale: Individuals can request deletion of personal data
controls.recommendation: Implement automated erasure processes with audit trails

controls.title: Data Quality and Integrity
controls.rationale: Maintain accurate and complete personal data
controls.recommendation: Implement data validation and verification procedures

controls.title: Lawfulness of Processing
controls.rationale: Process personal data only with lawful basis
controls.recommendation: Document legal basis for all data processing activities

controls.title: Transparency and Consent
controls.rationale: Provide transparency and obtain consent for processing
controls.recommendation: Maintain consent records and privacy notices

controls.title: Data Impact Assessment
controls.rationale: Assess risks of high-risk processing activities
controls.recommendation: Conduct DIAs for processing of sensitive personal data

controls.title: Data Protection Officer
controls.rationale: Designate a Data Protection Officer for oversight
controls.recommendation: Assign DPO with authority to oversee compliance

controls.title: Processor Contracts
controls.rationale: Ensure processors provide adequate guarantees
controls.recommendation: Require signed data processing agreements with all processors

controls.title: Notification of a Personal Data Breach to Supervisory Authority
controls.rationale: GDPR requires breach notification within 72 hours; automated detection is essential.
controls.recommendation: Enable Defender and configure alert rules for breach detection.

controls.title: Breach Notification Infrastructure
controls.rationale: Alerting infrastructure must enable timely breach notification.
controls.recommendation: Configure action groups with multiple notification channels.

controls.title: Communication of a Personal Data Breach to Data Subject
controls.rationale: Security contacts must be configured for breach communication workflows.
controls.recommendation: Configure security contacts with alert notifications for breach communication.

controls.title: Availability and Resilience of Processing Systems
controls.rationale: GDPR requires ability to restore availability and access to personal data.
controls.recommendation: Deploy Recovery Services vaults and configure backup for data stores.

controls.title: Data Redundancy
controls.rationale: Personal data storage must be geo-redundant for resilience.
controls.recommendation: Use geo-redundant replication for storage containing personal data.

controls.title: Records of Processing Activities
controls.rationale: GDPR requires maintaining records of all processing activities.
controls.recommendation: Maintain asset inventory as foundation for processing records.

controls.title: Data Classification for Data Minimisation
controls.rationale: Data classification supports data minimisation principles.
controls.recommendation: Apply data classification tags to identify personal data stores.
